dfi_spectrum_normalized_existence_and_no.decision_note: Typed normalized DFI returns finite data or an explicit singular witness; no neutral NaN/Inf coercion.

dfi_invariance_under_soi_rescaling_and_s.decision_note: Normalized entropy has an explicit scale-residual contract.

dfi_entropic_fluctuation_encoding_and_fl.decision_note: Finite and divergent DFI sectors are typed separately.

scale_normalized_dfi_homogeneity_invaria.decision_note: Genuine two-scale homogeneity operator with both-source ablations.

entropic_applicability_response_operator.decision_note: Thresholded entropic response is a two-source law with source-removal tests.

spatially_localized_dfi_consistency_clos.decision_note: Spatial exchange, boundary trace, normalization residual, ablations, and numerical-candidate status are explicit.

parity_definite_fluctuation_law_and_pari.decision_note: Exact orbit pDFI and declared positive inverse recurrence are typed; zero predecessors fail closed.

flowpoint_parity_correspondence_and_deco.decision_note: Flowpoint parity transport exposes its commutator residual.

pdfi_entropic_predictability_and_fluctua.decision_note: Observed, parity-selected, and masked increments remain distinct.

pdfi_driven_meta_observation_and_collaps.decision_note: Meta-observation is a typed masked finite sum without a physical-collapse claim.

pdfi_elastic_equivalence_and_decoupling.decision_note: pDFI and Elastic-pi path values are linked only by an explicit common-input calibration residual.

completeness_of_parity_driven_fluctuatio.decision_note: Domain, parity, and recurrence obligations are separate completeness gates.

parity_flowpoint_transport_law.decision_note: Genuine recurrence-Flowpoint interaction with both-source ablations.

predictability_observation_parity_coupli.decision_note: Prediction and observation are combined by a new interaction operator and both are necessary.

elastic_calibration_completeness_functio.decision_note: Elastic calibration and completeness gates form a non-carrier derived functional.

spatial_parity_elastic_calibration_closu.decision_note: Three complete B laws feed a local spatial operator with boundary, leakage, ablations, and numerical-candidate status.

dfi_elastic_equivalence_and_breakdown.decision_note: Authoritative pi*exp(-S/K_D) law and DFI reciprocity are exact when representable; numerical underflow is explicit.

elastic_e_curvature_encoding_and_curvatu.decision_note: Log-Laplacian proxy is separated from physical Ricci curvature and has an identity residual.

elastic_curvature_entropy_duality_and_de.decision_note: Forward curvature proxy and entropy reconstruction retain boundary anchors and reconstruction residual.

elastic_simulation_consistency_and_simul.decision_note: Independent reciprocal and logarithmic evaluations certify the simulation; clipping cannot discard diagnostics.

dfi_log_curvature_reciprocity_law.decision_note: Genuine DFI-log and curvature interaction with both-source ablations.

curvature_certified_simulation_residual.decision_note: Curvature reconstruction and independent simulation response form a necessary two-source certification law.

spatial_reciprocal_curvature_validation_.decision_note: Spatial local operator, boundary trace, reciprocity, certification, ablations, and candidate status are explicit.

weighted_path_functional_and_norm_admiss.decision_note: Preserved weighted path formula reports norm status on anchored domains and seminorm status otherwise.

elastic_field_ratios_and_weight_regulari.decision_note: Transition weights are positive Elastic-pi field ratios with a formula residual.

uniform_entropy_reduction_and_entropic_r.decision_note: Uniform lower and upper reweighting bounds are evaluated explicitly.

pdfi_elastic_norm_interface.decision_note: pDFI and the weighted norm share input only through an explicit calibration interface.

pdfi_elastic_norm_equivalence_and_decoup.decision_note: Equivalence is conditional on common support, fixed calibration, and zero residual.

weighted_path_ratio_regularity_functiona.decision_note: Path terms and field-ratio weights form a genuine interaction with both-source ablations.

entropy_pdfi_calibrated_norm_residual.decision_note: Bounds, pDFI interface, and equivalence status form a three-source calibrated residual law.

spatial_weighted_calibration_closure.decision_note: Spatial weighted closure reports boundary, localization, calibration, coercivity, ablations, and candidate status.
